name: End-to-End & Integration Tests
description: Playwright e2e test suite and API integration tests for OpenClaw Mission Control. Covers: login flow, overview page load (< 2s), agent list rendering, project CRUD flow, task board interactions (create, move, assign), PACT pipeline view for fixture projects, activity feed SSE updates, cost page rendering. Tests run against fixture data (mock openclaw.json and PACT directories) — no running OpenClaw instance required. Targets Chromium at minimum, with Firefox and WebKit configs. Includes integration tests for all API routes. Uses Page Object Model pattern, typed factory functions, Zod schema reuse for response validation, and per-run test isolation via temp directories and fresh SQLite databases.

types.description: Supported browser targets for Playwright test execution.

fields.name: test_dir
fields.description: Root directory containing all test specs.

fields.name: timeout_ms
fields.description: Default timeout per test in milliseconds.

fields.name: retries
fields.description: Number of retries on failure (0 in dev, 2 in CI).

fields.name: workers
fields.description: Number of parallel workers. Defaults to 50% of CPUs in CI.

fields.name: use_base_url
fields.description: Base URL for all page navigations.

fields.description: Environment variables passed to the server process. Must include TEST_FIXTURE_DIR and TEST_DB_PATH.

validators.error_message: Project name must be 1-200 characters.

validators.error_message: Input tokens must be non-negative and reasonable.

functions.name: globalSetup
functions.description: Playwright global setup function. Creates an isolated temp directory, copies fixture files (mock openclaw.json, PACT directories), initializes a fresh SQLite database from seed.sql, sets environment variables for the Next.js server, and returns a SetupResult stored in global state.

inputs.name: fixture_source_dir
inputs.description: Path to the static fixture data directory (tests/fixtures/).

validators.expression: path exists and is a directory
validators.error_message: Fixture source directory must exist.

inputs.name: seed_sql_path
inputs.description: Path to the seed.sql file for SQLite initialization.

validators.expression: path exists and is a file
validators.error_message: Seed SQL file must exist.

error_cases.name: fixture_dir_not_found
error_cases.condition: Fixture source directory does not exist

error_cases.name: seed_sql_invalid
error_cases.condition: seed.sql contains syntax errors or references non-existent tables

error_cases.name: temp_dir_creation_failed
error_cases.condition: Cannot create temp directory due to permissions or disk space

error_cases.name: fixture_copy_failed
error_cases.condition: File copy fails due to permissions or missing files

preconditions: Fixture source directory exists at tests/fixtures/ with openclaw/ and pact/ subdirectories
seed.sql file exists and contains valid SQLite DDL+DML statements
No prior test run temp directory conflicts (run_id is UUID-based)
postconditions: Temp directory created with unique run_id prefix
All fixture files copied to temp directory preserving structure
SQLite database created and seeded with test data
Environment variables TEST_FIXTURE_DIR and TEST_DB_PATH set for child processes
SetupResult contains at least 1 project, 2 agents, 3 tasks, 1 pipeline, and 5 cost entries

structured_side_effects.target: Temporary directory with copied fixture files (os.tmpdir()/e2e-{run_id}/)
Fresh SQLite database at temp dir path
Process environment variables (TEST_FIXTURE_DIR, TEST_DB_PATH, TEST_RUN_ID)

functions.name: globalTeardown
functions.description: Playwright global teardown function. Removes the temp directory and SQLite database created during setup. Cleans up environment variables.

inputs.name: run_id
inputs.description: The run_id from the SetupResult, used to locate the temp directory.

error_cases.name: temp_dir_not_found
error_cases.condition: Temp directory for run_id does not exist (already cleaned or never created)

error_cases.name: cleanup_permission_denied
error_cases.condition: Cannot delete temp files due to permissions or file locks

preconditions: globalSetup was called and completed successfully for this run_id
postconditions: Temp directory and all contents deleted
SQLite database file deleted
Environment variables cleaned up

structured_side_effects.target: Deletes temporary directory and SQLite database
Clears TEST_FIXTURE_DIR, TEST_DB_PATH, TEST_RUN_ID from process environment

functions.name: createProjectFixture
functions.description: Factory function to create a ProjectFixture with sensible defaults and optional partial overrides. Generates a UUID for id and current timestamps if not provided.

inputs.name: overrides
inputs.description: Partial<ProjectFixture> — any fields to override from defaults.

error_cases.name: invalid_override_field
error_cases.condition: Override contains a key not present in ProjectFixture

error_cases.name: invalid_override_value
error_cases.condition: Override value fails Zod validation for the field

postconditions: Returned ProjectFixture has a valid UUID id
All required fields are populated with either override or default values
Timestamps are valid ISO 8601 strings

functions.description: Factory function to create an AgentFixture with sensible defaults and optional partial overrides.

inputs.name: overrides
inputs.description: Partial<AgentFixture> — any fields to override from defaults.

error_cases.name: invalid_override_field
error_cases.condition: Override contains a key not present in AgentFixture

error_cases.name: invalid_override_value
error_cases.condition: Override value fails validation

postconditions: Returned AgentFixture has a valid UUID id
role is one of the valid agent roles
status is one of the valid agent statuses

functions.name: createTaskFixture
functions.description: Factory function to create a TaskFixture with sensible defaults and optional partial overrides. Requires project_id to be provided or present in overrides.

inputs.name: overrides
inputs.description: Partial<TaskFixture> — must include project_id if not relying on a default.

error_cases.name: missing_project_id
error_cases.condition: No project_id provided and no default context available

error_cases.name: invalid_override_value
error_cases.condition: Override value fails validation

preconditions: overrides contains project_id or a default project context is available
postconditions: Returned TaskFixture has a valid UUID id
project_id is set to a non-empty string
status is one of the valid task statuses

functions.name: createPactPipelineFixture
functions.description: Factory function to create a PactPipelineFixture with sensible defaults. Requires project_id.

inputs.name: overrides
inputs.description: Partial<PactPipelineFixture> — must include project_id.

error_cases.name: missing_project_id
error_cases.condition: No project_id provided

error_cases.name: invalid_override_value
error_cases.condition: Override value fails validation

preconditions: overrides contains project_id or a default project context is available
postconditions: Returned PactPipelineFixture has a valid UUID id
phase is one of plan, act, check, transform
contract_file path is set

functions.name: createCostFixture
functions.description: Factory function to create a CostFixture with sensible defaults. Requires agent_id.

inputs.name: overrides
inputs.description: Partial<CostFixture> — must include agent_id.

error_cases.name: missing_agent_id
error_cases.condition: No agent_id provided

error_cases.name: invalid_override_value
error_cases.condition: Override value fails validation

preconditions: overrides contains agent_id or a default agent context is available
postconditions: Returned CostFixture has non-negative token counts and cost
timestamp is a valid ISO 8601 string

functions.name: apiGet
functions.description: Typed API GET request helper. Sends a GET request to the specified API route and returns a typed ApiResponse. Validates the response body against an optional Zod schema.

inputs.name: base_url
inputs.description: Base URL of the running server.

inputs.name: path
inputs.description: API route path (e.g., '/api/projects').

validators.error_message: Path must start with /api/.

inputs.name: query_params
inputs.description: Optional query parameters as key-value pairs.

inputs.name: expected_status
inputs.description: Expected HTTP status code for assertion.

error_cases.name: connection_refused
error_cases.condition: Server is not running or unreachable

error_cases.name: unexpected_status
error_cases.condition: Response status does not match expected_status

error_cases.name: invalid_json
error_cases.condition: Response body is not valid JSON

error_cases.name: schema_validation_failed
error_cases.condition: Response body does not match provided Zod schema

error_cases.name: timeout
error_cases.condition: Request exceeds timeout threshold

preconditions: Server is running and reachable at base_url
Path is a valid API route
postconditions: ApiResponse.status matches expected_status
ApiResponse.body is parsed JSON (not raw string)
If Zod schema provided, body passes validation

structured_side_effects.target: HTTP GET to Next.js API route

functions.name: apiPost
functions.description: Typed API POST request helper. Sends a POST request with a JSON body and returns a typed ApiResponse.

inputs.name: base_url
inputs.description: Base URL of the running server.

inputs.name: path
inputs.description: API route path.

validators.error_message: Path must start with /api/.

inputs.name: body
inputs.description: JSON request body.

inputs.name: expected_status
inputs.description: Expected HTTP status code.

error_cases.name: connection_refused
error_cases.condition: Server is not running

error_cases.name: unexpected_status
error_cases.condition: Response status mismatch

error_cases.name: invalid_json
error_cases.condition: Response body is not valid JSON

error_cases.name: schema_validation_failed
error_cases.condition: Response body does not match schema

error_cases.name: timeout
error_cases.condition: Request exceeds timeout

preconditions: Server is running and reachable at base_url
body is a valid JSON-serializable object
postconditions: ApiResponse.status matches expected_status
ApiResponse.body is parsed JSON
Content-Type header is application/json

structured_side_effects.target: HTTP POST to Next.js API route
Server-side state (database records) via API

functions.name: apiPut

inputs.name: base_url

inputs.name: path

validators.error_message: Path must start with /api/.

inputs.name: body
inputs.description: JSON request body with updated fields.

inputs.name: expected_status
inputs.description: Expected HTTP status code.

error_cases.name: connection_refused
error_cases.condition: Server is not running

error_cases.name: unexpected_status
error_cases.condition: Response status mismatch

error_cases.name: resource_not_found
error_cases.condition: Target resource does not exist (404)

error_cases.name: invalid_json
error_cases.condition: Response body is not valid JSON

error_cases.name: timeout
error_cases.condition: Request exceeds timeout

preconditions: Server is running and reachable
Resource identified by path exists
postconditions: ApiResponse.status matches expected_status
Updated resource reflects provided changes

structured_side_effects.target: HTTP PUT to Next.js API route
Server-side state (database records) via API

functions.name: apiDelete
functions.description: Typed API DELETE request helper. Sends a DELETE request and returns a typed ApiResponse.

inputs.name: base_url
inputs.description: Base URL of the running server.

inputs.name: path
inputs.description: API route path including resource ID.

validators.error_message: Path must start with /api/.

inputs.name: expected_status
inputs.description: Expected HTTP status code.

error_cases.name: connection_refused
error_cases.condition: Server is not running

error_cases.name: unexpected_status
error_cases.condition: Response status mismatch

error_cases.name: resource_not_found
error_cases.condition: Target resource does not exist (404)

error_cases.name: timeout
error_cases.condition: Request exceeds timeout

preconditions: Server is running and reachable
Resource identified by path exists
postconditions: ApiResponse.status matches expected_status
Resource is no longer retrievable via GET

structured_side_effects.target: HTTP DELETE to Next.js API route
Server-side state (deletes database records) via API

functions.name: connectSSE
functions.description: SSE test helper. Opens a connection to the SSE endpoint via a page's JavaScript context, collects events for a given duration or until a condition is met, and returns the collected events. Uses page.evaluate() to avoid raw EventSource in Node.js.

inputs.name: base_url
inputs.description: Base URL of the running server.

inputs.name: endpoint_path
inputs.description: SSE endpoint path.

inputs.name: event_types
inputs.description: List of SSE event types to listen for. Empty list means all types.

inputs.name: timeout_ms
inputs.description: Maximum time to listen for events in milliseconds.

inputs.name: min_events
inputs.description: Minimum number of events to collect before returning early.

error_cases.name: connection_refused
error_cases.condition: SSE endpoint is not reachable

error_cases.name: timeout_no_events
error_cases.condition: No events received within timeout_ms

error_cases.name: invalid_event_format
error_cases.condition: SSE event data is not valid JSON

error_cases.name: connection_dropped
error_cases.condition: SSE connection unexpectedly closed by server

preconditions: Server is running and SSE endpoint is available
SSE endpoint supports the event_types filter parameter
postconditions: Returned list contains SSEEvent objects with valid event_type and data fields
Each SSEEvent.data is a valid JSON string
Connection is properly closed after collection completes

structured_side_effects.target: SSE connection to /api/events endpoint

functions.name: measurePageLoad
functions.description: Performance measurement helper. Navigates to a page and measures the time from navigation start to when the [data-ready] attribute appears on the page. Returns PerformanceMetrics. Used to verify the AC1 requirement (overview page loads in < 2s).

inputs.name: page
inputs.description: Playwright Page object reference (typed as string in contract, but Page in implementation).

inputs.name: url
inputs.description: Full URL to navigate to.

inputs.name: data_ready_selector
inputs.description: CSS selector for the data-ready marker element.

inputs.name: max_time_ms
inputs.description: Maximum acceptable load time in ms. Test fails if exceeded.

error_cases.name: data_ready_not_found
error_cases.condition: [data-ready] selector never appears on the page

error_cases.name: navigation_failed
error_cases.condition: Page navigation fails (404, 500, network error)

error_cases.name: performance_exceeded
error_cases.condition: elapsed_ms exceeds max_time_ms threshold

preconditions: Page object is valid and from a running browser context
URL is accessible and returns a 200 response
Target page renders a [data-ready] marker when fully loaded
postconditions: PerformanceMetrics.elapsed_ms is populated with actual measurement
If elapsed_ms > max_time_ms, the test assertion fails
navigation_start_ms < data_ready_ms

structured_side_effects.target: Browser navigation to target URL

functions.name: overviewPageLoad
functions.description: E2E test: Verifies the overview/home page loads within 2 seconds (AC1), renders agent summary cards, project list, and recent activity section. Asserts [data-testid='overview-ready'] marker appears.

inputs.name: page
inputs.description: Playwright Page object.

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Test run context with fixture data references.

error_cases.name: page_load_timeout
error_cases.condition: Overview page does not load within 30s timeout

error_cases.name: performance_ac1_failed
error_cases.condition: Page load exceeds 2000ms threshold

error_cases.name: missing_sections
error_cases.condition: Expected page sections (agents, projects, activity) not rendered

preconditions: Global setup has completed and fixture data is seeded
Next.js server is running
Overview page component renders data-testid='overview-ready' when loaded
postconditions: Page loaded in < 2000ms (AC1 acceptance criterion)
Agent summary section is visible with correct count
Project list section is visible with seeded projects
Recent activity section is visible

structured_side_effects.target: Browser navigation to overview page

functions.name: loginFlow
functions.description: E2E test: Verifies the login flow — navigates to login page, fills credentials, submits form, asserts redirect to dashboard overview.

inputs.name: page
inputs.description: Playwright Page object.

inputs.name: context

error_cases.name: login_form_not_found

error_cases.name: login_rejected
error_cases.condition: Login attempt rejected with error message

error_cases.name: redirect_failed

error_cases.name: timeout
error_cases.condition: Login flow exceeds test timeout

preconditions: Login page is accessible
Test user credentials exist in fixture data
postconditions: User is redirected to the dashboard overview page after successful login

structured_side_effects.target: Browser interaction with login page and API authentication endpoint

functions.name: agentListRendering
functions.description: E2E test: Verifies the agents page renders a list of agents from fixture data. Checks agent cards display name, role, status, and model. Asserts correct count matches seeded agents.

inputs.name: page
inputs.description: Playwright Page object.

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Test run context.

inputs.name: expected_agents
inputs.description: List of AgentFixture objects expected to be rendered.

error_cases.name: agent_list_not_found
error_cases.condition: Agent list container not rendered

error_cases.name: agent_count_mismatch
error_cases.condition: Number of rendered agent cards does not match expected count

error_cases.name: missing_agent_data
error_cases.condition: Agent card missing name, role, or status text

Fixture agents are seeded and readable by the data access layer
postconditions: Agent list container is visible
Number of agent cards matches expected_agents count
Each agent card displays name, role, and status
Agent statuses use correct visual indicators (color/icon)

structured_side_effects.target: Browser navigation to agents page

functions.name: projectCrudFlow
functions.description: E2E test: Exercises the full project CRUD lifecycle through the UI — create a new project, verify it appears in the list, update its name, verify update is reflected, delete it, verify removal.

inputs.name: page
inputs.description: Playwright Page object.

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Test run context.

inputs.name: project_data

error_cases.name: create_form_not_found
error_cases.condition: Project creation form elements not found

error_cases.name: create_failed

error_cases.name: update_not_reflected

error_cases.name: delete_not_reflected

error_cases.name: toast_not_shown
error_cases.condition: Success/error toast not displayed after operation

preconditions: User is authenticated
Projects page is accessible at /projects
Project create form is available
postconditions: Project was created and appeared in the project list
Project name was updated and the change reflected in the UI
Project was deleted and removed from the project list
No orphaned data remains after deletion

structured_side_effects.target: Browser interactions with project pages and API routes
Creates, updates, and deletes a project record via UI

functions.name: taskBoardInteractions
functions.description: E2E test: Exercises task board interactions — create a new task, verify it appears in the 'todo' column, move it to 'in_progress' column, assign it to an agent, verify all state changes persist.

inputs.name: context

error_cases.name: task_board_not_found

error_cases.name: task_create_failed

functions.name: pactPipelineView
functions.description: E2E test: Verifies the PACT pipeline view for a fixture project. Checks that pipeline phases (Plan, Act, Check, Transform) are rendered, current phase is highlighted, pipeline status indicators are correct, and contract artifacts are listed.

inputs.name: page
inputs.description: Playwright Page object.

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Test run context.

inputs.name: expected_pipeline
inputs.description: Expected PACT pipeline state from fixture data.

error_cases.name: pipeline_view_not_found
error_cases.condition: PACT pipeline container not rendered

error_cases.name: phases_missing
error_cases.condition: Not all four PACT phases are rendered

error_cases.name: wrong_active_phase
error_cases.condition: Active phase indicator does not match expected phase

error_cases.name: wrong_status
error_cases.condition: Pipeline status indicator does not match expected status

error_cases.name: pact_fixture_not_loaded
error_cases.condition: Pipeline data not loaded from fixture PACT directory

preconditions: User is authenticated
PACT fixture files exist in the temp directory
PACT pipeline view page is accessible
Pipeline data for the fixture project has been seeded
postconditions: Pipeline view container is visible
All four PACT phases are rendered (Plan, Act, Check, Transform)
Current phase matches expected_pipeline.phase and is visually highlighted
Pipeline status indicator matches expected_pipeline.status
Contract artifacts are listed if present

structured_side_effects.target: Browser navigation to PACT pipeline view page

functions.name: activityFeedSSEUpdates
functions.description: E2E test: Verifies the activity feed receives and renders SSE-driven updates. Triggers a server-side event (e.g., creates a task via API), then asserts the activity feed UI updates in real-time without page refresh.

inputs.name: page
inputs.description: Playwright Page object.

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Test run context.

inputs.name: trigger_event_type
inputs.description: Type of event to trigger (e.g., 'task_created').

validators.error_message: Must be a known trigger event type.

error_cases.name: sse_not_connected
error_cases.condition: Browser SSE connection not established

error_cases.name: event_not_received
error_cases.condition: Activity feed did not update after trigger within timeout

error_cases.name: wrong_event_data
error_cases.condition: Activity item data does not match triggered event

error_cases.name: feed_order_wrong
error_cases.condition: New event not at top of feed (chronological order broken)

preconditions: User is authenticated and on the activity feed page
SSE connection is established from the browser to /api/events
Server is configured to emit events for the trigger action
postconditions: Activity feed contains a new item corresponding to the triggered event
New activity item appeared without page refresh (SSE push)
Activity item displays correct event type, message, and timestamp
Activity feed maintains chronological order (newest first)

structured_side_effects.target: Browser SSE subscription + API call to trigger event
Creates a record via API to trigger SSE event

functions.name: costPageRendering
functions.description: E2E test: Verifies the cost tracking page renders correctly. Checks that cost summary shows total cost, token counts, and per-agent breakdown. Verifies recharts-based cost visualization chart is rendered with data points.

inputs.name: page
inputs.description: Playwright Page object.

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Test run context.

inputs.name: expected_costs
inputs.description: List of CostFixture objects expected to be reflected in the UI.

error_cases.name: cost_page_not_found
error_cases.condition: Cost page does not load

error_cases.name: summary_missing
error_cases.condition: Cost summary section not rendered

error_cases.name: chart_not_rendered

functions.name: integrationTestApiProjects
functions.description: Integration test: Exercises all /api/projects endpoints — GET list, GET by ID, POST create, PUT update, DELETE. Validates response shapes against Zod schemas from lib/types/. Tests error cases (404, 400 validation errors).

inputs.name: base_url
inputs.description: Base URL of the running server.

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Test run context with seeded data.

error_cases.name: schema_mismatch
error_cases.condition: API response does not match expected Zod schema

error_cases.name: wrong_status_code
error_cases.condition: API returns unexpected HTTP status

error_cases.name: missing_error_details
error_cases.condition: Error response missing expected error/message fields

error_cases.name: server_error
error_cases.condition: API returns 500 unexpectedly

preconditions: Server is running with test fixture database
At least one project exists in seeded data
postconditions: GET /api/projects returns list with seeded projects
GET /api/projects/:id returns correct project by ID
POST /api/projects creates a new project and returns 201
PUT /api/projects/:id updates project and returns 200
DELETE /api/projects/:id removes project and returns 200
GET /api/projects/:nonexistent returns 404
POST /api/projects with invalid body returns 400 with Zod error details
All response bodies pass Zod schema validation

structured_side_effects.target: HTTP requests to /api/projects endpoints
Creates, updates, and deletes project records via API

functions.name: integrationTestApiTasks
functions.description: Integration test: Exercises all /api/tasks endpoints — GET list (with project_id filter), GET by ID, POST create, PUT update (status change, assignment), DELETE. Validates response shapes against Zod schemas.

inputs.name: base_url
inputs.description: Base URL of the running server.

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Test run context with seeded data.

error_cases.name: schema_mismatch

error_cases.name: wrong_status_code
error_cases.condition: Unexpected HTTP status

error_cases.name: filter_not_working
error_cases.condition: project_id filter returns tasks from other projects

error_cases.name: server_error
error_cases.condition: API returns 500

postconditions: GET /api/tasks returns list with seeded tasks
GET /api/tasks?project_id=X filters correctly
POST /api/tasks creates a task linked to a project
PUT /api/tasks/:id updates task status and assignment
DELETE /api/tasks/:id removes task
POST with missing project_id returns 400
PUT with invalid status returns 400
All response bodies pass Zod schema validation

structured_side_effects.target: HTTP requests to /api/tasks endpoints

error_cases.name: schema_mismatch

functions.name: integrationTestApiPact
functions.description: Integration test: Exercises /api/pact endpoints — GET /api/pact/pipelines (list), GET /api/pact/pipelines/:id (detail). Validates that pipeline data matches PACT fixture directories. Tests graceful handling of missing/malformed PACT files.

inputs.name: base_url
inputs.description: Base URL of the running server.

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Test run context with seeded data.

error_cases.name: schema_mismatch

error_cases.name: pipeline_data_mismatch
error_cases.condition: API pipeline data does not match fixture content

error_cases.name: malformed_not_handled

error_cases.condition: Server cannot read PACT fixture directories

postconditions: GET /api/pact/pipelines returns list matching fixture pipeline data
GET /api/pact/pipelines/:id returns correct pipeline detail
GET /api/pact/pipelines/:nonexistent returns 404
Pipeline phases and statuses match fixture data
Malformed PACT files result in graceful error (not 500 crash)

functions.name: integrationTestApiEvents
functions.description: Integration test: Exercises the /api/events SSE endpoint. Validates that the SSE connection is established, events have correct format (event type, JSON data, optional id), connection supports event type filtering via query params, and connection cleanup works properly.

inputs.name: base_url
inputs.description: Base URL of the running server.

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Test run context.

error_cases.name: wrong_content_type
error_cases.condition: Response Content-Type is not text/event-stream

error_cases.name: connection_closed_early
error_cases.condition: SSE connection closes before any events received

error_cases.name: invalid_sse_format
error_cases.condition: Events do not follow SSE protocol format

error_cases.name: filter_not_working
error_cases.condition: Event type filter does not exclude unmatched types

error_cases.name: no_heartbeat
error_cases.condition: No heartbeat/ping event received within expected interval

preconditions: Server is running with SSE endpoint available at /api/events
At least one event source is producing events (or heartbeat is configured)
postconditions: SSE connection is established with correct Content-Type (text/event-stream)
Connection remains open (no premature close)
Events have valid SSE format (event:, data:, optional id:)
Event data is valid JSON
Event type filtering via ?types=X,Y query param works
Connection closes cleanly when client disconnects

structured_side_effects.target: SSE connection to /api/events endpoint

functions.name: seedDatabase
functions.description: Helper function to seed the test SQLite database with fixture data. Executes seed.sql and inserts additional fixture records generated by factory functions. Used by globalSetup.

inputs.name: db_path
inputs.description: Path to the SQLite database file.

inputs.name: seed_sql_path
inputs.description: Path to the seed.sql file with DDL and initial data.

inputs.name: projects
inputs.description: List of ProjectFixture records to insert.

inputs.name: tasks
inputs.description: List of TaskFixture records to insert.

inputs.name: costs
inputs.description: List of CostFixture records to insert.

error_cases.name: db_creation_failed
error_cases.condition: Cannot create or open SQLite database at db_path

error_cases.name: seed_sql_error
error_cases.condition: seed.sql contains syntax errors

error_cases.name: fk_constraint_violation
error_cases.condition: Task references non-existent project_id

error_cases.name: duplicate_id
error_cases.condition: Fixture contains duplicate IDs

preconditions: db_path is writable
seed_sql_path exists and contains valid SQL
All fixture lists contain valid data
postconditions: Database schema created from seed.sql DDL
All projects inserted into projects table
All tasks inserted into tasks table with valid foreign keys
All costs inserted into cost tracking table
Database is in a consistent state (all FK constraints satisfied)

structured_side_effects.target: SQLite database file at db_path

functions.name: writeFixtureFiles
functions.description: Helper function to write mock OpenClaw and PACT fixture files to the temp directory. Creates openclaw.json, agent session files, and PACT pipeline/contract JSON files.

inputs.name: target_dir
inputs.description: Temp directory path to write fixture files into.

inputs.name: agents
inputs.description: List of AgentFixture records to write as OpenClaw config.

inputs.name: pipelines
inputs.description: List of PactPipelineFixture records to write as PACT directories.

error_cases.name: target_dir_not_writable
error_cases.condition: Cannot write to target directory

error_cases.name: json_serialization_error
error_cases.condition: Fixture data cannot be serialized to JSON

error_cases.name: disk_full
error_cases.condition: Not enough disk space to write fixture files

preconditions: target_dir exists and is writable
agents list is non-empty
pipelines list is non-empty
postconditions: target_dir/openclaw/openclaw.json exists with agent configuration
target_dir/openclaw/sessions/ contains session files for each agent with a session_file path
target_dir/pact/ contains pipeline directories with contract JSON files
All written JSON files are valid and parseable

structured_side_effects.target: OpenClaw and PACT fixture files in temp directory

sse_endpoint: GET /api/events (SSE stream with multiplexed event types)
ui_components: data-testid attributes on all interactive and landmark elements

invariants: No test may require a running OpenClaw instance or PACT daemon — all external dependencies are mocked via fixture files
All tests use fixture data from the tests/fixtures/ directory — no hardcoded data in test specs
Test isolation: each test run uses a unique temp directory and fresh SQLite database, identified by run_id
All API response bodies are validated against production Zod schemas from lib/types/ — schema drift is detected immediately
Page Object Models encapsulate all DOM selectors — test specs never contain raw CSS selectors
All element selection uses data-testid attributes — no fragile class or tag selectors
Chromium is the primary test target and must pass on every CI run; Firefox and WebKit are secondary targets
The overview page must load in under 2 seconds as measured from navigation start to [data-ready] marker (AC1)
SSE tests assert UI-level updates (activity feed items appearing) not raw EventSource messages
Factory functions always generate valid fixture data — invalid data for error case testing uses explicit override
All test helper functions and Page Object methods have explicit TypeScript type annotations
Integration tests are independent of e2e tests — they can run in isolation via Playwright project filtering
Global setup runs once per test suite invocation, not per test file — state is shared via SetupResult in global store
PACT file parsers are tested for graceful degradation — malformed fixture files must not cause test infrastructure crashes
Performance budget assertions use p95 latency, not single-run measurements — flaky timing assertions are forbidden
requires: Next.js 15 dev server via webServer config
data-testid attributes on all target UI components
